name: shot-scraper
author: Bill Welense
abstract: Visual verification and DOM/accessibility inspection for frontend development using shot-scraper. Teaches agents to screenshot dev servers after UI changes, extract rendered HTML, dump accessibility trees, and execute JavaScript for state inspection.

patterns.note: Single SKILL.md with inline command patterns, no separate pattern files

triggers: Check what the UI looks like

visual-verification.description: Auto-screenshot after frontend file changes to verify UI

dom-inspection.description: Extract rendered HTML, scoped by CSS selector

accessibility.description: Dump Chromium accessibility tree for a11y verification

javascript-execution.description: Run JS to extract component state, computed styles, errors
